fixes.origin:
args = ["powershell", "-NoProfile", "-Command", f"Invoke-Expression \"{text}\""]
proc = subprocess.run(args, capture_output=True, encoding="utf-8")
fixes.replacement:
allowed = {"list": "Get-ChildItem -Force", "who": "whoami", "time": "Get-Date"}
key = text.lower()
script = allowed.get(key)
if script is None:
    raise ValueError("Unsupported expression")
args = ["powershell", "-NoProfile", "-Command", script]
proc = subprocess.run(args, capture_output=True, encoding="utf-8")
